question: Within India, Ganga river basin has the largest catchment area. After that, following is the correct sequence in the decreasing order :

options.1: the areas of low rainfall with low leaching activity.
options.2: the areas of high temperature and high rainfall with intense leaching.
options.3: the areas of heavy rainfall and high humidity with good vegetation.
options.4: the areas of semi-arid climate with salinity.

options.1: Tropical forests found in the Bastar region
options.2: Tropical evergreen forests of Andaman & Nicobar islands
options.3: Moist deciduous forests in the North-eastern states
options.4: Temperate forests in the Anaimalai and Palani hills
